channel.title: httpd on Hi~Roy!
channel.description: Recent content in httpd on Hi~Roy!

item.title: 解决apahce部署python程序503错误
item.description: 今天更新服务器后，发现使用apache部署的某个python程序无法访问了，返回503错误，报错日志如下： [Thu Apr 13 10:54:40 2017] [error] [client 127.0.0.1] (13)Permission denied: mod_wsgi (pid=1814): Unable to connect to WSGI daemon process 'trac' on '/etc/httpd/logs/wsgi.
